name: 07_Image_Super_Resolution_SRCNN_Set5_DL
query: Habari, nahitaji kuunda mradi wa kuongeza azimio la picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRCNN na seti ya data ya Set5 (inapatikana kutoka `https://huggingface.co/datasets/eugenesiow/Set5`). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Wakati wa kupakia data, jumuisha hatua za usindikaji wa awali wa picha kama vile kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfano wa SRCNN unapaswa kupakiwa na kutumika katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi seti 5 za picha za kulinganisha, ukizoom kwenye maelezo, kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`, na matokeo ya kuongeza azimio kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`. Picha zilizozalishwa zinapaswa kuwa za ubora wa juu na kuonyesha wazi maboresho.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.
Matokeo ya kuongeza azimio yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`.

preferences.criteria: Mradi unapaswa kuzalisha picha za kuongeza azimio za ubora wa juu, zilizo wazi na zenye kulinganisha kwa kina.
Picha za matokeo zilizopangwa vizuri, zikionyesha maboresho muhimu, zinapaswa kujumuishwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder. It contains no actual implementation for loading the "Set5" dataset from Hugging Face. The `load_dataset()` function returns a hardcoded dictionary and does not demonstrate any interaction with the Hugging Face platform or the specific dataset. The file only lists requirements and keywords but does not fulfill them.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The code in `src/data_loader.py` contains only placeholder functions (`load_dataset` and `build_transforms`) that return hardcoded strings or dictionaries. There is no actual implementation of image preprocessing, resizing, or normalization. The file is a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging and does not perform the required operations.

<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/model.py` does not contain an actual SRCNN model implementation. It only contains a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging with placeholder functions and keywords. The file returns a string "model placeholder" from its `build_model()` function and does not define or import any SRCNN architecture. The trajectory evidence mentions successful model creation and training, but the actual file content shows no real SRCNN model code.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the key evidence shows that the file `super_resolution_compare.png` could not be read due to an error: "No endpoints found that support image input". While the trajectory evidence states the file was created and saved without system errors, the actual content check reveals the file is not a valid, accessible image for verification. The existence of a file does not confirm it contains the correct five sets of comparison images with enhanced details.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya kuongeza azimio yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the content of the file `super_resolution_results.png` shows an error message indicating a failure to read the image file due to an API error ("No endpoints found that support image input"), rather than containing the actual super-resolution results. The trajectory evidence confirms the file was created successfully during execution, but the current file content reveals it does not contain the intended output image.
